programme.title: Strange Evidence: Chasing Bigfoot
programme.desc: An eerie creature is recorded stalking Georgia's ancient forest, and some believe it's Bigfoot. Terrifying explosions rock the streets of Manhattan. Cameras record a mysterious object diving into a deadly volcano, leaving experts stumped.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Attack of the Fire Devil
programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes in moments. Cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway, turning a remote area into a UFO hot spot. A bizarre glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, and some wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Night of the Chupacabra
programme.desc: A camera captures footage of a Chupacabra-like beast. At an observatory on Hawaii's Mauna Kea, cameras record a mysterious explosion that looks like a nuclear bomb detonated in space. Video of spontaneous combustion is taken at a haunted bar.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Doomsday Swamp
programme.desc: A high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway. Deep in Louisiana, a swamp devours 100-foot trees, and experts worry that a nearby town could be next. Three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Jungle Werewolf
programme.desc: A strange beast is spotted in a remote Brazilian town. A cataclysmic blast sparks fears of nuclear disaster. When a child displays superhuman powers, some fear it's the devil's work.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: America's Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A strange creature like the Loch Ness Monster is recorded in America. Experts analyze evidence of a giant scaly egg, and some wonder if it belongs to a dragon. Birds are suddenly vaporized by an invisible death ray.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Gateway To Hell
programme.desc: A fire-breathing crater burns in the middle of a desert, and some suspect it's a gateway to hell. A deadly shark is found lurking in a golf course water hazard, and experts are baffled how it got there. A giant white blob threatens a town in California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Close Encounters
programme.desc: Josh begins his search for extraterrestrial life with a once-in-a-lifetime visit to NASA.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Ancient Visitors
programme.desc: Josh's journey continues on remote Easter Island, where ancient alien theorists believe extraterrestrials visited a millennia ago.

programme.title: Unexpected: We're Talking About Crazy People
programme.desc: Chloe goes to the prom without Max. Caelan and Shelly meet with an attorney. Alex feels caught between Tyra and his grandmother. Rilah's blood pressure spikes, and her baby's heart rate drops. After another fight with Matthew, Hailey gets shocking news.

programme.title: Unexpected: She Don't Know How to Love
programme.desc: Rilah delivers her baby. Caelan records a song he wrote about McKayla. Max comes home from rehab and Chloe graduates high school.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: If This RV's 'a-Rockin

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Back to the Farm: The Last Dance

programme.desc: Zach and Tori make final preparations for baby Lilah's arrival, Matt and Caryn prepare to babysit Jackson, and Amy is in a cooking frenzy preparing meals for Tori's post-C-section recovery. Then, everyone scrambles when Tori goes into labor unexpectedly.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: It's a Small World

programme.desc: Courtney bonds with the big boys while Eric plays Mr. Mom, watching the babies and planning a Valentine's Day surprise for Courtney. After a big scare in the house, the Waldrops must decide whether to stay in their home during the remodel or rent a house.

programme.title: Nate & Jeremiah by Design: Santa Barbara Easy
programme.desc: Homeowners Jim and Shawn ask Nate and Jeremiah to help them renovate their outdated, poorly laid out home. Their hope is that they'll be able to enjoy some more quality time with their three daughters while they still live at home.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Wedding Prep and a Reality Check
programme.desc: With Zack and Tori's wedding just a few months away, the entire family comes together to help prepare the farm for the big day. Matt and Amy are still unsure what the future holds for their relationship, and youngest son Jacob makes a huge announcement.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: A Prom Kiss and A Prom Diss
programme.desc: It's prom season and Liz and Anna are ready to party, with dresses bought and dates lined up. Find out if it will be the romantic night they've dreamed of. Plus, Amber's turning the big 4-0 and the family devises a surprise trip to celebrate.

programme.title: Freaky Eaters: Addicted to Cheesy Potatoes
programme.desc: The specialists are called in to help Kelly, a 34-year-old woman obsessed with eating cheesy potatoes.

programme.title: Freaky Eaters: Addicted to Cola
programme.desc: Dr. Dow and JJ Virgin are called in to save a girl who drinks 30 cans of cola daily, before it ruins her fragile health.

programme.title: Freaky Eaters: Addicted to Fries
programme.desc: A 29-year-old mother cannot eat anything but French fries. Over the course of one week, Dr. Dow attempts to solve the mystery behind Amber's rare eating disorder.

programme.title: Freaky Eaters: Addicted to Raw Meat
programme.desc: Dr. Dow and JJ Virgin are asked to save a young man driven by a dangerous compulsion to eat raw meat.

programme.title: Freaky Eaters: Addicted to Maple Syrup
programme.desc: A 26-year-old man addicted to maple syrup needs to break his addiction to save himself from diabetes or worse.

programme.title: Freaky Eaters: Addicted to Corn Starch
programme.desc: Nikki Myles consumes up to 3,300 calories a day in cornstarch, and Dr. Dow will attempt to break her of her dangerous compulsion.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Renee's Story

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley R.'s Story
programme.desc: At 670 pounds Ashley must live in her parents' home with her husband. Desperate to save her life and her marriage, she decides it's time for a drastic change.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Vianey and Allen's Story
programme.desc: Weighing over 600 lbs. each, Vianey and Allen are locked in a codependent relationship based on a shared love of food. As they head to Houston, they will soon find out if their relationship can handle the strain of growing healthy together.

programme.desc: Nev and co-host Elle King help Angel find her online love Remy. But the closest Angel has ever gotten to Remy was when he was creepily watching her from outside her car.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Whitney and Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on an LBGT site four years ago and is head-over-heels in love, even though Brenell refuses to video chat with her. Whitney is desperate to find out why and hopes that what she knows about Brenell is true.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nicole and Nicole

programme.desc: Mike Posner joins Rob and the crew. Topics include 'too many pills,' 'bromantic bonds' and 'white girl problems.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CX
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling CX are here to choose their weapons, get better friends and impress a group of scream queens.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Ross and Jordan
programme.desc: As an aspiring stand-up comedian in Brooklyn, NY, Ross couldn't believe his luck when he started dating the girl of his dreams, Jordan. Unfortunately four months ago, the love of his life ghosted him.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Russell and Destiney
programme.desc: Russell ghosted Destiney two years ago when she told him she was pregnant with his child, but he's since realized his wrongdoings and wants to make amends.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Resee and Brendan
programme.desc: Resee's one shining glimmer of happiness in conservative, small town Illinois was his bestie, Brendan. But when Brendan up and moved to San Francisco, he fully ghosted Resee.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Julia and Delmond
programme.desc: Julia and Delmond had been BFFs since they were in diapers, but their lifelong friendship ended when Delmond ghosted her one fateful day.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sheklia and Talli
programme.desc: A concerned son reaches out when his mom's mysterious online boyfriend seems too shady for comfort. Mom is also hiding secrets of her own, and once Nev and Max find their man, things take a bizarre turn that leave them shocked.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Andria and David
programme.desc: David is the only love Andria has ever known. His passionate love letters and voice messages have a way of making Andria stay. But having never met after 10 years, Andria needs to know what David is hiding that keeps him away.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lawrence and Cierra
programme.desc: After a number of near-death experiences, Lawrence survived through it all with the assurance of Cierra's online love. But with Cierra blowing Lawrence off whenever they try to meet, Nev and Max must learn the truth about her.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dylan and Ally

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Derek and Annabelle
programme.desc: A mystery email leads Nev and Laura to help Derek track down his online love Annabelle. After digging, they uncover a sexy Snapchat scandal, betrayal, and a conclusion that hits closer to home than Derek could have ever dreamed.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: William and Jamie
programme.desc: Akirra contacts Catfish for help to stop her bae's online ex, Jamie, from harassing her and her boyfriend William. But the script is flipped when Nev and Kamie find out that William has received thousands of dollars from Jamie.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ray and Lexi
programme.desc: Ray is determined to finally meet his online love of four years, Lexi. After learning that Lexi's sister has meddled in the relationship in the past, Nev and Max soon find themselves with more questions than answers.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nick and Melissa
programme.desc: Nick and Melissa have been communicating daily for years, but have never met. Before Nick heads to college, he wants to go meet Melissa, and find out if she's the person he thinks she is.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Water Torture

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Himself
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam battles with his inner self-doubt over how biases affect the show. He then explores the shortcomings of storytelling and the influence (or lack thereof) of advertising on the integrity of the series.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Very Cavallari: Red Carpet Ready

programme.title: Very Cavallari: Roughing It
programme.desc: Kristin and Jay take their friends on a wildly hilarious camping trip. Jay is right at home in the wilderness, while everyone else feels like a fish out of water. Brittainy makes a serious error at the office, which quickly turns into a major issue.

programme.title: Very Cavallari: Ciao Bella!
programme.desc: Kristin travels to Tuscany to get in touch with her Italian roots and meet long-lost relatives for the first time. She brings Jay along as well, making plenty of time for epically romantic adventures.

programme.title: Very Cavallari: Read Between the Wines
programme.desc: Kristin and Jay's friends show up in Italy and bring the party with them! The crew embarks on a wine-fueled romp through the Italian country-side, having a fabulous time along the way.

programme.title: Very Cavallari: New Store, New Chapters
programme.desc: The stakes are high as Kristin launches her second retail store in Chicago. It's a huge moment for Uncommon James and Kristin needs every detail to be absolutely perfect. After an emotional year, Brittainy struggles to find direction in her personal life.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Rise of Browntown

programme.title: Counting Cars: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: Danny may be in over his head when he takes on his first boat. Kevin is left behind for a speedy Plymouth Superbird while Danny breaks one of his cardinal rules by going all in on a custom trike frame.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Searching for Soul
programme.desc: Danny is commissioned by Barry White's estate to find and restore the legendary singer's Stutz IV Porte. Meanwhile, an old pullover visits the shop with a custom job that could teach The Count a lesson.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Haunted Hog
programme.desc: Danny has no interest in a rubber-to-roof restoration on a '73 Chevy Blazer until he hears that it's a tribute to the owner's nephew. Later, a haunted hotel owner wants a creepy bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Muscle Memory
programme.desc: Kevin is won over by a hotrod pick-up truck. Danny tracks down a customer's original 1969 Firebird, but its terrible condition may make it impossible to restore, and an unannounced visitor causes drama at the shop.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Floodpocalypse Now
programme.desc: Danny tries to score an ex-police motorcycle without getting busted, while a water main break threatens to put the shop permanently under water.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Horn Ultimatum
programme.desc: Danny discovers the rarest Cadillac collection he's ever seen. Later, Horny Mike has 30 days to move his big ugly bus from the shop's parking lot before Danny has it sent to the dump.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Zombie Truck
programme.desc: Kevin and Roli make an unplanned stop to check out a mysteriously small vehicle. Later, Danny gets a call from Rob Zombie who wants to customize a truck for his upcoming tour that kicks off in just seven days.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sharon Rides Again
programme.desc: A motorcycle-loving couple wants to hit the road again like they used to. Sharon hasn't been able to ride comfortably since she lost a leg, so it's up to Danny and the crew to build a bike that is comfortable, safe and as cool as the couple that's riding.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Power and Glory
programme.desc: When Mark asks Danny to build a bike in memory of eight sailors who were lost while serving with him on the USS Belknap, Danny knows he must create something special in their honour. Later, Danny finds a beautiful, rare Corvette in a driveway.

programme.title: Counting Cars: School of Rick
programme.desc: The Count takes a chance by building a low-rider with a Count's Kustoms twist. Later, a businesswoman commissions the shop to surprise her husband with his very first bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Dune Buggy Blues
programme.desc: Danny has found and bought a replacement for his beloved Dune Buggy 'Sparkles.' As the guys are turning it into the ultimate '70s beach fantasy, Mike convinces Ryan to take it for a quick joy ride that ends anything but joyful.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Down by the Riviera
programme.desc: Legendary rocker George Lynch from the metal band Dokken stops by with his very cool 1965 Buick Riviera. He gives Danny free rein to put the Count's Kustoms rock 'n' roll touch on it. Also, Roli and Horny Mike custom wrap Roli's detailing van.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Black, White and Hotrod All Over
programme.desc: Danny and the boys meet with a customer who wants a wicked paint job to match his 1959 Anglia dragster. Meanwhile, Shannon and Ryan are building a custom Harley Davidson Bagger for a client using a repurposed police bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: El Camino Royale
programme.desc: Danny continues his El Caminos love affair with a 1975 beauty. But if he's going to flip this ride for a big profit, the Count's Kustoms crew will have to put aside their differences.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Crazy Cool Cadillac
programme.desc: Ryan reluctantly goes down the Caddy customization wormhole on a personal project, and everyone at the shop is happy to watch him go, just to see how great it turns out.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Get Your Motor Running
programme.desc: Danny and Shannon are in motorcycle heaven when they are asked to restore a rare 1957 Harley Davidson Pan head prototype.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Fast and the Ridiculous Part One
programme.desc: Ryan, Mike and Shannon convince Danny to sponsor them in a 24-hour endurance race called The LeMons. This race pits cheap hunks of junk against each other deep in the Arizona desert. Meanwhile, Danny has the guys work on a special one of a kind project.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Fast and the Ridiculous Part Two
programme.desc: The guys finally find a not so perfect car for the Arizona Lemons race; a beat up old racer, once owned by Shannon. With a little begging and very little cash they buy it back. Next they resurrect the Junker as the 'Counts Bloody Mess.'

programme.title: Counting Cars: Burt Reynolds' Rides
programme.desc: Vegas Golden Knights goalie Marc-André Fleury comes to Count's Kustoms looking for an all-American muscle car fit for a three-time Stanley Cup champion. Plus, Danny agrees to prep several of Burt Reynold's personal rides for auction.

programme.desc: Antonio's son was kidnapped, and he has a feeling the Columbian drug gang is to blame. The Columbian gang leader is being held in jail and suggests his release may trigger the release of Diego.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chin Check
programme.desc: After the discovery of large amounts of cop killer ammo, the Intelligence Unit is in a quest to find the source.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Now Is Always Temporary
programme.desc: The intelligence squad is in hot pursuit of a counterfeiting ring as Atwater and Burgess come across something unexpected in a hoarder's home.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Thirty Balloons
programme.desc: A run in with a psychotic woman leads the Intelligence Unit to discover a drug smuggling operation which has put several lives in peril.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Conventions
programme.desc: Voight and Antonio enlist the agents of the Special Victims Unit to help track down the culprit of a series of rapes and murders. Burgess has the opportunity to prove herself to Intelligence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Price We Pay
programme.desc: Tensions between Voight and Antonio builds as Internal Affairs digs into a murder case which potentially involves Voight's son.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Different Mistakes
programme.desc: Voight is assigned to a new Internal Affairs handler, Stillwell, who proves to be suspicious of Voight's actions.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Material Witness
programme.desc: A case hits close to home when the intelligence unit takes on a gang shooting with one living witness.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: At Least It's Justice
programme.desc: Voight pulls Halstead's badge when Lonnie Rodiger is found dead. After a car accident, Severide and Clarke discover the torso of Dr. Elliot who has been instrumental in putting away high profile criminals.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Ninguna Salida
programme.desc: After new information is revealed, NCIS travels to Mexico for a risky mission to locate and rescue Mosley's son, despite the misgivings of some team members.

programme.title: Dateline: Heart of Darkness
programme.desc: After a Virginia man’s wife and son are kidnapped while on vacation in the Philippines, a dangerous group of international terrorists demands millions in ransom. With time running out, the FBI joins the case, which comes to a heart-stopping conclusion.

programme.title: Snapped: Poisonous Love
programme.desc: Featuring two poisonous love stories: a wealthy socialite and a Midwestern woman who have only one thing in common.

programme.title: Snapped: Katrina Ben
programme.desc: After casually dating Katrina for less than a month, Eric is found dead in his apartment. The suspicious death leaves the police asking if it was a suicide, an intruder, or if Katrina is responsible for his murder.

programme.title: The Price of Duty: Daron Wyatt
programme.desc: When a young woman is mysteriously murdered, Detective Daron Wyatt must use behavioral science, overlooked evidence and a chilling interrogation tape to solve the case and bring closure to her family, and himself.

programme.title: The Price of Duty: Jerry Clark
programme.desc: The infamous Erie, PA bombing case is widely known for its disturbing and bewildering twists and turns. But for lead FBI investigator, Jerry Clark, the pursuit of solving the puzzle takes a heavy toll on both he and his family.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: New England Nightmare
programme.desc: A murderous ripple spreads through a lovely New England town when a ghastly discovery is made in a backyard barn. The search for answers uncovers troubling questions about a doting mom and everyone is a suspect until the truth is finally uncovered.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Fatal Secrets
programme.desc: Investigators in York, Pennsylvania enter a dark world of buried secrets after a couple makes a stunning discovery in their backyard. A brother appears desperate to find his sister, but in a strange twist could lead detectives to a staggering truth.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Deep in the Cornfields
programme.desc: Federal agents descend on a tiny Ohio town after a beloved girl goes missing. Fearing their cornfields harbor a terrible truth, theories abound and panic spikes in this serene community. It's a race against time as investigators close in on a killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Living in Fear
programme.desc: A case of identity theft in the Arizona desert takes a blood curdling turn when investigators make a ghastly discovery in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Desperate Search
programme.desc: A Southern California community is gripped by fear when one of its own vanishes without a trace. When a teen disappears, they fear a backyard park has become a hunting ground. A vicious predator must be stopped before it's too late.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: He Wasn't Alone
programme.desc: When a Florida teen tending to some yard work digs up a frightening scene, investigators find themselves in the middle of a twisted affair. A wild trail of evidence leads them across three state lines and the discovery of an astounding truth.

programme.title: Snapped: Carmen Montelongo
programme.desc: A mysterious disappearance leads police to a woman pushing a trash can full of body parts down the street.

programme.title: Snapped: Christine Billis
programme.desc: A car crashes into a tree, killing a man. Was it just a tragic accident or a murder plot?

programme.title: Snapped: Kristi Fulgham
programme.desc: A 13-year-old confesses to murder, but police suspect he's being manipulated by his half-sister.

programme.title: Movie: Thoroughbreds
programme.desc: A teenaged girl with a strict stepfather reconnects with a childhood friend who admits to not being able to feel any emotions. Together, they begin plotting to murder the stepfather and recruit a local delinquent to help with their scheming.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Veterinarian
programme.desc: After performing CPR on a tased raccoon, Lisa discovers her calling to be veterinarian and becomes an intern at the local office, but learns a tough lesson when her neglected class hamster dies.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Marge-ian Chronicles
programme.desc: Lisa volunteers for a future one-way journey to Mars, much to Marge's chagrin. As she searches for a way to convince Lisa not to go, Marge hits upon the most devious strategy of all and volunteers to go along for the ride.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Burns Cage
programme.desc: When Smithers is devastated by Mr. Burns' lack of affection towards him, Homer makes it his mission to find him a boyfriend. Meanwhile, Bart orchestrates the removal of the lead in the school's stage production of 'Casablanca.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back
programme.desc: After getting into an argument, Marge takes Lisa on a touristy trip to Capital City, where, after attending a musical, they meet the show's star, Andrew Rannells, who reminds Lisa how lucky she is to have such a great mom.

programme.title: The Simpsons: To Courier With Love
programme.desc: After promising Marge the trip of a lifetime, frugality gets the better of Homer when he makes a deal with a travel agent to be a courier of a top-secret briefcase in exchange for a discounted family vacation to Paris.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Orange Is the New Yellow
programme.desc: When Marge gets arrested for letting Bart go to the park unsupervised, she serves time only to realize that prison is a welcome break from the demands of her life as a mom and wife. In her absence, Homer tries to manage the parenting responsibilities.

programme.title: Family Guy: Don't Be a Dickens at Christmas
programme.desc: A selfish Peter loses his Christmas spirit and is visited by ghosts of Christmas past, present and future who take him on a journey around Quahog in the style of Charles Dickens' 'A Christmas Carol.'

programme.title: Family Guy: Married With Cancer
programme.desc: Brian meets and quickly falls in love with a woman named Jess, who reveals she has cancer. After she receives devastating news regarding her diagnosis, Brian proposes marriage to her.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dead Dog Walking
programme.desc: Brian's marriage to Jess is not what he envisioned, especially after her miraculous recovery from cancer. At the suggestion of Peter, Brian lets himself go, causing Jess to make a surprising decision.

programme.title: Family Guy: V Is for Mystery
programme.desc: In a special Dickensian-themed episode, Stewie and Brian are detectives who embark on solving a string of mysterious murders set in Victorian-era London.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Better Off Sled
programme.desc: The battle is on when some angsty teenagers take over Louise, Gene and Tina's usual sledding territory, inciting an epic turf war. Bob steps in to help Linda who realizes she’s on crunch time to get three scarves knitted in time for Christmas.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Nightmare on Ocean Avenue Street
programme.desc: The kids set out for their regular Halloween shenanigans, but when everyone's candy bags start mysteriously disappearing, it's up to Tina, Louise and Gene to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Teddy decorates the restaurant to compete with another handyman.

programme.title: Archer: Archer 1999: Robert De Niro
programme.desc: When a trial turns into a party it can only mean that Barry-6 has returned!

programme.title: Archer: Mole Hunt
programme.desc: Archer goes to great lengths to cover up discrepancies in his ISIS expense account as he attempts to access the agency's mainframe computer. Cyril and Lana's Friday night dinner date is interrupted by work.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Psycho Pete Returns
programme.desc: When Psycho Pete, long lost member of the freight train, is released from the mental hospital, Dennis and Dee rush to get him recommitted while Charlie and Mac attempt to restore him to his former hard-partying form.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Charlie Work
programme.desc: When a surprise health inspection falls on the same day as one of the gang’s less hygienic schemes, Charlie tries to keep the gang working together to make sure Paddy’s makes the grade.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: A Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Dr. K must act quick and perform emergency surgery on a tortoise crushed by a car.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Ferret Freak Out!
programme.desc: A binge-eating pig finds out that what goes down, must come up; a toothache sends Dr. T down a rabbit hole; and a stubborn egg sends a sick chick to the hospital.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Call of Doodie!
programme.desc: A macaw with a mysterious mass has Dr. K going beyond the call of duty, while Dr. T gets a visit from a tiny tortoise who lost a fight with a pit bull puppy.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Show Me the Bunny
programme.desc: Broken toes, worm infestations and nursing puppies send the clinic into a whirlwind. The chaos is usually routine for the team, but Dr. Pol and Diane are short-handed.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cranes, Sprains and Automobiles
programme.desc: Spontaneous blizzards and chill temperatures are complicating things at Pol Veterinary Services this spring, but that doesn’t slow the team down.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Twist and Snout

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Doc Nose Best
programme.desc: Neither rain nor snow can stand in the way of the team at the clinic, but this year, the weather is putting them to the test.

programme.title: When Nature Calls: Between a Rock and a Raccoon
programme.desc: Venomous rattlesnakes, unruly raccoons, and pack rats are on the loose across America.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Nazis in the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence in the Bermuda Triangle could reveal the Nazis got closer to America than ever believed, and using the latest cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the shipwreck that shouldn't exist.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Titanic's Lost Sister
programme.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Ghost Fleet of Doom
programme.desc: Discoveries reveal the treasures of a ghost fleet of Japanese ships at the bottom of the South Pacific, and using cutting-edge underwater technology, experts are investigating a top-secret superweapon that could have changed the course of World War II.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Strangest Pyramids
programme.desc: New archaeological discoveries reveal secrets hidden deep inside Egypt's greatest and most mysterious pyramids, and using cutting-edge methods, experts investigate how calamities, grave robbers, and the ravages of time affected these ancient marvels.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Cities of the Cursed
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge technology to unearth the dark truths behind mysterious lost cities built by Egypt's greatest pharaohs. New leads help archaeologists investigate the apocalyptic events that transformed one city forever.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dark Secrets of the Pyramid
programme.desc: New evidence could help solve some of the Great Pyramid's greatest mysteries. Follow the investigation into how it was built, revealing the truth behind its hidden tombs and deepest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Cities of the Cursed
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge technology to unearth the dark truths behind mysterious lost cities built by Egypt's greatest pharaohs. New leads help archaeologists investigate the apocalyptic events that transformed one city forever.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Black Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Black Pyramid is the strange, crumbling pyramid that collapsed before its pharaoh was ever buried here, and today, it's largely unexplored. Special access to a hi-tech archaeological investigation reveals what went so catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Phantoms of Chernobyl
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to the large town located just outside of Chernobyl on the eve of disaster, a fleet of ghost ships, and a dangerous mountain road that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Experts investigate the fate of billions of dollars in gold and artwork that Hitler stole during World War II, and using brand-new discoveries, they might finally locate the whereabouts of the missing Nazi treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Legend of the Turin Shroud
programme.desc: The Turin Shroud is believed to be the burial cloth of Jesus and proof of his existence, but skeptics disagree. Experts investigate this ancient relic to determine if the shroud is genuine, or one of the most elaborate hoaxes in history.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Nazi Raiders of the Holy Grail
programme.desc: As the Nazi war machine tore through Europe, they plundered museums in search of holy relics that would grant them untold power and prestige. experts investigate how close Hitler was to discovering the Holy Grail and its promise of eternal life.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Curse of the Crystal Skulls
programme.desc: Mysterious crystal skulls could be long-lost relics of Aztec and Maya civilizations that grant supernatural powers, according to some; experts investigate new leads to reveal if these strange objects are genuine artifacts or if they're modern-day fakes.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Search for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Mysterious evidence on Mt. Ararat could be the long-lost remains of Noah's Ark, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate if these discoveries are hard proof of the Biblical legend.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Needs Enemies
programme.desc: A cold morning in December starts off like any other until a rural farmer discovers the body of a dead woman. What seems like a sadistic rape and murder turns into a conspiracy and before long the diabolical nature of someone close is revealed.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Lies
programme.desc: In 2015, Detective Scott Sanderson finds himself solving one of the strangest cases of his career. At its center are a newborn and her missing mother. Before long he'll uncover a diabolical scheme that will destroy the lives of everyone it touches.

programme.title: Diabolical: Weeping Widow
programme.desc: After losing her husband in a tragic accident, God-fearing Cindy McKay claims she's had to bend the law to pay off his illicit debts. But authorities soon realize she's a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lie For Me
programme.desc: Air Force veteran Michael Giles disappears along with his savings of $206,000. Detectives discover a woman named Kwaneta Harris has been draining the man's accounts. But as they dig deeper, detectives uncover a massive conspiracy of greed and murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Evil Sister Act
programme.desc: When Samuel Johnson Jr. suddenly vanishes, San Antonio investigators find themselves face-to-face with two sisters who know something. Through a series of interrogations, they reveal an elaborate murder plot meticulously engineered by a puppeteer.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Nightmare in Northport
programme.desc: Narleen Campton was found viciously beaten to death in her own home after she didn't contact her daughter Sabrina on Thanksgiving. Who would want to murder the 62-year-old grandmother? The investigation unravels a murky world of drugs and violence.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Missing in Alaska
programme.desc: Mike Dixiano is heartbroken when his wife Angela Dixiano dies from organ failure after a lifelong battle with drugs and alcohol. Friends and family grieve her death, but when investigators can't find a death certificate, her husband comes under scrutiny.

programme.title: Diabolical: Evil Sister Act
programme.desc: When Samuel Johnson Jr. suddenly vanishes, San Antonio investigators find themselves face-to-face with two sisters who know something. Through a series of interrogations, they reveal an elaborate murder plot meticulously engineered by a puppeteer.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Nightmare in Northport
programme.desc: Narleen Campton was found viciously beaten to death in her own home after she didn't contact her daughter Sabrina on Thanksgiving. Who would want to murder the 62-year-old grandmother? The investigation unravels a murky world of drugs and violence.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Never Coming Home
programme.desc: A mother and her two young sons vanish in rural Wyoming, prompting a nationwide search. Leads dry up and the case goes cold... until a dark secret is revealed, leading investigators to another homicide they had no clue could solve four murders.

programme.title: Diabolical: Weeping Widow
programme.desc: After losing her husband in a tragic accident, God-fearing Cindy McKay claims she's had to bend the law to pay off his illicit debts. But authorities soon realize she's a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Kill Me Twice
programme.desc: Allentown, PA loses all sense of security when a calculated serial killer starts preying on unsuspecting women in the middle of the night. When one woman refuses to be his next victim, the killer goes on a relentless tirade that ends in his own demise.

programme.title: Dead of Night: That's My Brother
programme.desc: Two murders just one year apart have the police of Great Falls, Montana on high alert. Morris Davis and Suzette Pritchard are the victims of brutal overkill, leading police to believe there is a killer is on the loose. But one tip changes everything.

programme.title: Murder Calls: The Slender Man
programme.desc: When a young mother is shot dead in front of her son, horrified witnesses call 911 and describe the shooter as a slender man who disappeared into nearby trees. Though clues are scarce, investigators finally uncover the killer's shocking identity.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Big Sky Murder
programme.desc: A frantic woman calls 911 when she finds her husband shot to death. The investigation reveals allegations of harassment from the victim's ex-lover and eventually uncovers a complex trail of deceit, in a murder that was years in the making.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Cleveland 911 receives call from a panicked woman saying a mysterious man forced his way into her home and shot her boyfriend in front of their kids. Detectives have to untangle a twisted web of jealousy to find out who killed this young father and why.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Death Mask
programme.desc: A concerned man calls 911 to say he's on the phone with his girlfriend, and she's in trouble. When police respond, her two frightened sons answer the door. Their mom has been beaten severely.

programme.title: Murder Calls: If I Can't Have You
programme.desc: When a man calls 911 screaming for help but too terrified to give his address, police scramble to find him. As detectives investigate, they uncover a shocking tale of torture and revenge one that proves that unrequited love can be deadly.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Unholy Ghost
programme.desc: Church parishioners call 911 when they find their priest unconscious, after he fails to show up for Mass who has been stabbed to death. Police uncover an earlier call made by the victim himself, and track a missing cell phone to a find deranged killer.

programme.title: Murder Calls: The Silencer
programme.desc: With the help of a neighbor, an injured woman calls 911 saying an intruder broke into her boyfriend's home and shot them both. Police respond and find the boyfriend executed. Cops must decipher strange evidence left behind to identify the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: In September 2015, Edward Lowry is found savagely beaten and stabbed to death in a parking lot in South Dakota. With little evidence left behind at the scene, can police painstakingly piece together Ed's last moments from CCTV to find his killer?

programme.title: See No Evil: What Happened to Skylar Neese?
programme.desc: Every parent's worst nightmare comes true when a schoolgirl disappears without a trace. But a few seconds of surveillance footage leads cops to the most shocking discovery imaginable.

programme.title: See No Evil: Loretta's Last Valentine
programme.desc: On February 14th, 2014, pregnant college student Loretta Saunders vanishes without trace. Her trail runs cold after she is spotted on CCTV at her apartment building. The race is now on to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: See No Evil: Mr. Reed Will See You
programme.desc: Keith Reed is found gunned down on his doorstep. What seems like a possible crime of passion is turned on its head after a surprise discovery. Surveillance footage helps police unravel the mystery behind Keith's death and just who killed him.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: Restored: 1922 American Colonial Arts and Crafts

programme.title: Restored: 1900 Victorian Farmhouse
programme.desc: A couple seeks Brett's help restoring their big 1900 Victorian Farmhouse in time for their wedding. They're hoping he can design a rustic kitchen, update the laundry area and add light to the interior rooms closed off by past modifications.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis
programme.desc: Beth wants a beach getaway on the white sandy beaches of Ambergris Caye, Belize. Ken Grissom and his crew transport building materials to the remote island and construct an off-the-grid luxury getaway with the Caribbean water just steps away.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Underground Living
programme.desc: Specialty builders Jon and Amanda D'Aleo design and build 'Earth-sheltered' homes for clients in Southern Colorado, but they weren't expecting a project this far off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: West Coast Roasts
programme.desc: Visiting the Passmore Ranch in Sloughhouse, Roger must try to catch a fish by hand. Also, at the Santa Maria Elks Lodge, he will assist in building a fire pit for cooking up some beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fireplace Feasts
programme.desc: Roger loves cooking in a fireplace. He visits two places in New England that host fireplace feasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pigging Out On Pork
programme.desc: One of the great wonders of the barbecue world is smoked pork shoulder. It's a big hunk of meat cooked low and slow until succulent and tender. Roger's favorite way to devour this delicious thing of beauty is in a sandwich.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Low Country Cookouts
programme.desc: Roger's in charming South Carolina for two spectacular low country cookouts: a traditional backyard pig pickin' and a classic oyster roast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat on a Stick
programme.desc: Roger visits two chefs in Texas who created the craziest cooking contraptions and prove that everything's bigger in Texas.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rib-a-Licious
programme.desc: Roger's on the hunt for lip-smacking barbecue ribs and he found two places where the racks of meat stack up to perfection.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue in the Big Apple
programme.desc: Michael Symon is joined by his good buddy Michael Strahan at their favorite New York City burger spot. They bounce around The Big Apple dining on meatball sliders, succulent St. Louis style ribs and pastrami-topped pizza.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Champion Burger Knockouts
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in San Diego with a Champ Burger loaded with beer-braised pork that packs a powerful punch, and he can't pass up a cookie-brownie mashup that satisfies every sweet tooth.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Kicked-Up Classics
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Memphis with a triple-layered twist on regional dry-rub ribs and a succulent corned beef that's a 30-day labour of love. Then, in Phoenix, classic mac and cheese gets a boozy boost from a special in-house brew.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Detroit, Michigan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventure brings him to Detroit for the famous Detroit-style, Sicilian square pan pizza.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Heston's Fantastical Food: Breakfast
programme.desc: Heston tackles the meal our mom's told us never to miss, breakfast.

programme.title: Heston's Fantastical Food: Tea Break
programme.desc: In this episode Heston celebrates the most notable of British occasions, the tea break, by bringing it back on such a massive scale when a whole town is brought together for a brew. Tea and biscuits are still a staple of Britain.

programme.title: Heston's Fantastical Food: Pub Pie
programme.desc: Heston tries to put the fun back into the food and drink of the great British pub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hollywood
programme.desc: Andrew explores legendary hotspots and diverse culinary treasures in Hollywood, California. He highlights classic steak and martinis, Thai steamed whole fish, Armenian flatbread topped with minced beef and Persian ice cream.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris
programme.desc: In the city of love, Andrew Zimmern explores the delicious delicacies of Paris, France; from the indulgent steak frites and the croque monsieur, to the baked croissant and baguette, to the sweet macaroons and savory crepes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Cod
programme.desc: Andrew explores the treasures of Cape Cod's coastal cuisine. From fried clams to fresh-caught cod, clambakes to cranberry bog ice cream, the Massachusetts peninsula's culinary scene is cause for summertime celebration.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Barcelona
programme.desc: Andrew takes us to Barcelona, a coastal city that draws its edible inspiration directly from the mountains and sea. From tapas to crema Catalana, the foods of this Mediterranean city reflect history and culture in every bite.

programme.desc: Follow a young generation’s fight for equality in the fields, on campuses and in the culture, claiming a new identity: Asian Americans. New immigrants and war refugees expand the population and definition of Asian America.

programme.title: Asian Americans: Breaking Through
programme.desc: Revisit the turn of the millennium, when Asian Americans are empowered by growing numbers and rising influence but face a reckoning of what it means to be an American in an increasingly polarized society.

programme.title: Nova: Decoding the Pyramids

programme.title: History Detectives: Hot Town Poster/ Face Jug/ Lost City of Gold
programme.desc: We get to the bottom of an old protest poster, referring to the police as 'pigs on the street.' Then, we investigate an antique jug with a grimacing face. Lastly, an old rock with a Spanish inscription threatens what we know about U.S. history.

programme.title: Nature: Spy in the Wild: The North
programme.desc: Travel to the Northern Hemisphere, where the spy creatures learn how animals move, feed and fight. A spy hummingbird films millions of butterflies, and a spy squirrel finds itself in a battle. A spy beaver watches other beavers building dams.

programme.title: H2O: The Molecule That Made Us: Crisis
programme.desc: Learn how Earth's changing water cycle, and water for profit, is forcing changes across the globe.

programme.title: Nova: Decoding the Pyramids
programme.desc: Stunning new archaeological evidence provides clues about the Egyptians who built the Great Pyramid of Giza—and how they did it. Join researchers as they delve into the logbook of a work crew and discover how the massive project transformed Egypt.

programme.title: The Amazing Human Body: Grow

programme.title: Shakespeare Uncovered: Much Ado About Nothing With Helen Hunt

programme.title: Civilizations: The Second Moment of Creation

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Terror in the Taxi
programme.desc: Houston taxi cab drivers become the deadly target to a couple in love with each other, power, and money.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Deadly Hotel Check-In
programme.desc: College student Elisa Lam checks into a Los Angeles hotel, but never checks out. The last known images of the tourist are from the hotel’s elevator security camera. Nearly 2 weeks later, her naked body is found floating in the hotel's rooftop water tank.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mom of Three Vanished

programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: UFOs Over England
programme.desc: The hunt for alien life continues in Zimbabwe, where Josh interviews witnesses from one of the largest UFO sightings in modern history. Then, in England, he investigates the infamous case that has become known as 'Europe's Roswell.'

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: Roswell Revealed
programme.desc: Josh's epic search for extraterrestrial life comes to a close in the USA, where a legendary investigation team brings him to a hot case in Arkansas. Then, he visits with a researcher who may have new information on the mother of all UFOs.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: The Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Josh Gates follows in the footsteps of Indiana Jones as he searches for an iconic biblical relic.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Mysteries of Jesus
programme.desc: Josh Gates journeys to the Holy Land to investigate the mystery of where Jesus Christ was actually born. The investigation leads to potentially explosive revelations that may change our understanding of Jesus' origin story.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Armed with a degree in archaeology and a passion for travel, Josh Gates investigates unsolved iconic stories across the globe. Immersing himself in different cultures to understand the world as they do, Josh hunts out the truth behind the legend.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: True Cross of Christ
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Jerusalem and Istanbul to pursue the True Cross of Christ.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Gold Rush of the Atlantic
programme.desc: Josh Gates has a fresh lead on the massive lost treasure of the shipwrecked 1715 Spanish fleet. Josh returns to the waters of Florida's Atlantic coast and dives in with a new expedition that uses the latest high tech to locate the fleet's flagship.

programme.desc: In the dark caves and thick jungles of Puerto Rico, Josh Gates tracks a possible Chupacabra.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Secrets of the Space Force
programme.desc: Newly declassified documents reveal that the US Space Force is the culmination of decades of top-secret military programs to weaponize the cosmos, and special access exposes the cutting-edge weapons and sci-fi defense systems behind real-life star wars.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: To Catch an Alien
programme.desc: A top-secret government program might have proof that aliens have visited earth, and a former CIA operative uses newly declassified documents and special access to investigate if the US military already has its hands on advanced, alien technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: How to Stop an Assassination
programme.desc: Newly declassified document reveal the details of a top-secret government program created in the wake of the Kennedy assassination to go to extreme lengths to protect the president. A former CIA operative exposes the cutting-edge defenses now in place.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Iron Man Army
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates newly declassified documents that reveal the secrets of a multibillion-dollar mission to build a real-life Iron Man equipped with superhuman strength, cutting-edge weapons, and telepathic abilities.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Rise of the Nightstalkers
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates new evidence of a top-secret group known as the 'Nightstalkers,' a clandestine team of the world's best aviators involved in the assassination of Osama Bin Laden and other dangerous black ops.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Terror in Tanzania
programme.desc: Two survivalists take on the African Serengeti to survive for 21 days with no food, water or clothes.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Beware the Bayou
programme.desc: Billy Berger and Ky Furneaux are dropped in it up to their necks as they have to survive 21 days in the Louisiana swamp. They are washed out of their shelter by storms, must battle deadly snakes and avoid hungry alligators.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Pain Forest
programme.desc: Two survivalists attempt to endure 21 days in the Malaysian rainforest. With relentless rainstorms, they will have to fight the elements with only their knowledge of the wilderness.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Redemption Road
programme.desc: AK, a past survivalist, returns for her chance at redemption. Her partner Jason joins her in tackling the jungle of Guyana, but the two have different priorities. Starvation sets in causing tension to rise. They'll have to come together to survive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Hell or High Water
programme.desc: A special ops vet teams up with a single mom to fight torrential rains, flash floods and sickness in Thailand's Sai Rung River Valley. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before the river leaves them stranded from the crew.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Lost World
programme.desc: In this special episode, two lucky fans are selected to take on a special 14-day survival challenge. A single mom and an optimistic novice try to survive the wild coast of South Africa.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: Two pairs of strangers, dropped on opposite ends of the remote Panamanian rainforest, eventually meet and must work together to conquer the Everest of extreme survival challenges.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Vianey and Allen's Story
programme.desc: Weighing over 600 lbs. each, Vianey and Allen are locked in a codependent relationship based on a shared love of food. As they head to Houston, they will soon find out if their relationship can handle the strain of growing healthy together.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Dottie and Cynthia
programme.desc: Dottie faces an unexpected challenge to her weight-loss when her husband's drinking problem becomes intolerable for her and her son. Cynthia starts to wonder if being there for her kids at her current weight is more important than losing more.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Charity, Charly and Teretha
programme.desc: In order to keep pace with her daughter Charly's impressive weight loss, Charity must do something she's never done: find a way to go it alone. Try as she might, Teretha finds one too many obstacles in the way of continuing with Dr Nowzaradan's program.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brianne's Story
programme.desc: At over 700 pounds, Brianne undertakes a weight-loss journey to save her own life and faces an unexpected challenge to her fragile progress when her husband suffers a heart attack on a birthday she will never forget.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Charity, Charly and Teretha

programme.desc: The joker that required medical attention during the fat foot race punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrapper's Delight

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Human Piñata

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: You're Cut Off

programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joke and Dagger

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pseudo-Sumo

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Getting Testy
programme.desc: When Savannah makes a proposal to Todd, one that would allow her go to college a year early, he wages an all-out family competition to keep her at home as long as possible, and Chase pays the price by having Todd as his ACT coach.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: My Chrisley Valentine
programme.desc: When Todd learns that Chase is dating several different girls on Valentine's Day, he recruits Savannah to help teach his son a lesson about respecting women.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Invitation Interrupted
