programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: What to Expect
programme.desc: Aliens exist. Scientists lay out what we can expect them to be like by grappling with difficult questions.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: How to Prepare
programme.desc: Inject a dose of cutting-edge research into an action-packed journey through space, to find out exactly whether aliens might come here, and how to prepare when they arrive.This everything you need to know; it's the definitive guide.

programme.title: Alien Planet Earths
programme.desc: The search for Earth's twin is the hottest topic in astronomy. Thanks to NASA's ground-breaking Kepler mission, astronomers believe there are over 20 billion alien worlds with liquid water and therefore the potential for life.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Message
programme.desc: Take a look at what might really happen if we got a message from space. Scientists and sci-fi writers, with cooperation from SETI and Carl Sagan's son, Nick, unravel the impact of this world changing event.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Arrival
programme.desc: Take a look at how humans may react when an alien spacecraft makes its way to Earth.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: A team of experts use the latest science and cutting-edge technology to investigate if extraterrestrial life has contacted humankind, and what they discover could reveal if there's an international conspiracy to cover it all up.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Mystery of Doomsday Jungle
programme.desc: When 400 earthquakes strike a remote jungle in Mexico over just two weeks, dozens of UFO sightings are reported nearby, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this bizarre event is the smoking gun evidence of alien contact.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Hunt for the Alien Relics
programme.desc: New clues suggest that aliens were in contact with the ancient cultures of Mesoamerica, and to prove it, a team of experts hunt down mysterious artifacts that could change everything we know about our place in the cosmos.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: The Volcano Enigma
programme.desc: New evidence points to a strange link between UFO sightings and volcanoes, and to test the explosive theory, a team of experts investigate one of the most mysterious mass reports of alien contact in history.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Alien Crater of Doom
programme.desc: New discoveries of strange evidence in the forests of Argentina suggest an alien craft landed here, and to prove it, a team of experts use cutting edge technology to investigate the area and hunt down the truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: Shadow of Hope
programme.desc: On December 26th 2011, Hope Melton vanishes after being run off a country road. CCTV footage from a nearby gas station reveals a suspicious orange car that seems to have followed her out of the parking lot.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop
programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: At Michelle's Door
programme.desc: The News Year's disappearance of Michelle Thornton leads to a gruesome discovery. With no witnesses, only the four security cameras from her apartment building can help decipher what happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: One of Our Own
programme.desc: Documenting how surveillance cameras assist with solving crime in America.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stopwatch
programme.desc: In 1993, a night clerk is shot dead inside the lobby of a hotel. Despite eyewitness accounts, Detective Postiglione can't locate the killer. Recalling subtle clues left outside the crime scene, he finally comes face to face with a most unusual suspect.

programme.title: See No Evil: Far From Home
programme.desc: In 2017, Chinese exchange student, Yingying Zhang, mysteriously vanishes from the University of Illinois campus. Police and FBI turn to video surveillance footage to uncover the shocking and sinister reality and bring a cold-blooded murderer to justice.

programme.title: See No Evil: One of Our Own
programme.desc: Documenting how surveillance cameras assist with solving crime in America.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stopwatch
programme.desc: In 1993, a night clerk is shot dead inside the lobby of a hotel. Despite eyewitness accounts, Detective Postiglione can't locate the killer. Recalling subtle clues left outside the crime scene, he finally comes face to face with a most unusual suspect.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop
programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: After 32-year-old Mark Mueller's body is pulled from the shore of Lake Michigan, police wonder how his favorite fishing spot became a scene for murder. It's not until his burned-out car is found miles away that officers finally get some answers.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Misty River
programme.desc: In the marshy waters of Florida's Indian River, a local judge makes a grisly discovery: the body of a young woman, bound and floating in the water. Now police are searching for the person who brought 22-year-old Misty Morse to her watery grave.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Married to Death
programme.desc: After a wild Christmas party, Ed Amos wakes to find his wife, Bobbe dead from an apparent cocaine overdose. When her toxicology report suggests foul play, detectives dig into their pasts to uncover greed, secret love affairs, and suspicious deaths.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Hate and Fury
programme.desc: When three synagogues simultaneously go up in flames, federal agents work around the clock to solve the arsons. They get an unexpected break when a double murder 150 miles away reveals new evidence - and a sinister plot of bigotry, fire and fury.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Heat of the Night
programme.desc: In El Dorado County, CA, firefighters combatting a raging fire discover a burnt out SUV with the charred remains of a beloved local man reported missing just hours earlier, igniting an investigation into a sinister scheme, and exposing a deadly affair.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Dungeon of Dread
programme.desc: When an off-duty police officer in San Francisco happens upon a minor theft at a lumberyard one Sunday afternoon, he unwittingly jumpstarts an investigation into one of California's deadliest, most depraved serial killers: Leonard Lake and Charles Ng.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: The Executioner
programme.desc: When a boat distributor reports a potential yacht theft in Oakland, California, local detectives are called to investigate. A sting operation ensnares a master manipulator with an unexpected day job and a voracious appetite for money and murder.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Blood and Oil
programme.desc: In 2012, a missing person case in North Dakota grabs the attention of Homeland Security. Investigators unravel a scheme involving stolen fracking profits, a ruthless conman and his murderous partner, and at least two victims of their boundless greed.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: The Devil's Ranch
programme.desc: A college student goes missing on Spring Break, and authorities work around the clock to locate him. When a man runs a drug checkpoint, the investigation takes a grisly turn into a world of drug smuggling, the occult, and human sacrifice.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Set Me Free
programme.desc: When Detectives looking for missing Mom, Tami Reay find blood in her car they arrest her husband, Brad. But then they receive a tip off, pointing the finger at an entirely new suspect.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Lake of Lies
programme.desc: Investigators must cast a wide net for clues when the family of Breckenridge resident Sharon Garrison report her missing. There's evidence to suggest she's skipped town, but a set of secret cassette tapes soon point to something far more sinister.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dead Man Talking
programme.desc: Dedicated father of two, John Riebe, is found dead on the floor of his home in Toledo, Ohio. The investigation quickly turns on those closest to John, and a series of phone calls and voicemails prove key in uncovering a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Bloodlines
programme.desc: An elderly couple are found murdered in their home. At first it's believed to be a robbery-gone-wrong until detectives realize it may me a family member with a grudge.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Epic Inventions
programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Fire In the Sky
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we explore the myths behind extraterrestrial spacecraft and we learn the truth of two pioneering flights.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Saluting the Truth
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we reveal the startling truth of two legendary generals, George Patton and Ulysses S. Grant. You'll also get a reality check on the roaring twenties and lawless thirties.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we reveal the startling truth of two legendary generals, George Patton and Ulysses S. Grant. You'll also get a reality check on the roaring twenties and lawless thirties.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Fire In the Sky

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Epic Inventions
programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Murder at the Vatican
programme.desc: Explore four conspiracy theories relating to the Catholic Church. See if Pope John Paul I was poisoned or if the Church knew about Nazi war criminals fleeing to South America.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: House Sandwich
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house that’s flooding after two monster custom homes are built on either side. The homeowners want to blame the builders, but Mike reveals that the real solution lies closer to home.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Urea Got Me
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house recently retrofitted with a substance that’s been banned in Canada for decades.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: What Comes Down Must Go Up
programme.desc: Facing major structural and water issues at the river house, Mike and MJ decide to take the whole house down so they can build it back up right. This is a major setback, and their profit will take a big hit unless they identify some areas to save.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions and Delays
programme.desc: Trusses go up at the river house until MJ learns that the permits for the new build have not yet been approved. Mike goes to the council meeting hoping to hear good news, but it's a waiting game in the meantime. Designer Sarah Richardson offers advice.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: After MJ and Lisa's wedding, smooth sailing is wishful thinking as Mike and MJ are welcomed back to the river house by a river of muck. The deck posts and windows get installed as they rush to get the house closed in before the winter weather arrives.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Game Changer
programme.desc: Mike's vision for open concept at the suburban house hits a structural snag and MJ attempts to rein him in before the budget takes another hit. A fun surprise awaits the team at the river house, until Mike throws another curveball at MJ.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Rock Pond Living Space
programme.desc: A dirt pile of a backyard with an old shed and dying plants is transformed into an entertainer's dream. An unused space quickly becomes everyone's hangout when a cascading rock pond takes center stage.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine
programme.desc: A creative family builds a three-story tiny house full of clever features in the easternmost property in the U.S. But with limited experience and a tight deadline, they'll need the help of a few locals to get it done. Follow their journey now.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Lighthouse
programme.desc: After witnessing the demise of Casco Bay's Halfway Rock lighthouse, Ford Reiche has the chance to return this icon to its former glory. It will take barges full of scaffolding, masons, and the cooperation of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Coastal Maine
programme.desc: Jason and Crystal always wanted an escape in the middle of Maine's secluded coastline for their family to unplug and enjoy nature. With the help of a small group of friends, they set their sights on building a 320-square-foot cabin in just 12 days.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Lake Resort Pool
programme.desc: An active family in southern California wants an extravagant pool to remind them of their favorite lakeside vacations. The kings don't know which is bigger, their clients' wish list or the 20-foot jumping cliff they have to create from scratch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lake View Paradise
programme.desc: A couple wants to build their daughter a backyard oasis that also accentuates their beautiful lake views.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Stakes Are High
programme.desc: A young family recently relocated to College Grove, TN and they desperately miss having a pool to enjoy. With a major elevation issue in their new backyard, Kyle and his team have a challenging build to tackle.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Slidin' Into Home
programme.desc: A Texas family returns to their home state of North Carolina and wants to add a pool to their 70-acre property. The kinds design a pool packed with fun features including a custom slide, a waterfall and an outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's Tiki Time
programme.desc: The Pool Kings whip up a Tiki-themed, resort-style pool featuring a custom putting green for the entire family to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Wildebeest and Waterfalls
programme.desc: Texas grandparents want a backyard and waterfall that is even more of an attraction for their grandkids than the exotic animals that live next door. The crew create an oversized fire pit, a dog-friendly Baja shelf and a boulder waterfall.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Custom Contemporary
programme.desc: Matt and Jen want to tear out their old deck and rebuild their backyard to match the hill country modern vibe they love and give them a place to enjoy quality family time.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Southern Oasis Pool
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their flat Houston, Texas, yard into a southern oasis. Unpredictable weather, tricky soil conditions and some new material leaves Paul and Brian figuring out how to blow the family's expectations out of the water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Pool With a View
programme.desc: Paul and Brian learn the hard way that it isn't always so sunny in California as they transform an odd-shaped outdoor space into an elevated pool with an ocean view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool
programme.desc: Vic and Yukari had to leave their beloved pool behind when they moved into a California community. Brian and Paul must create an epic pool in the couple's new, small space, and the design includes an exposed acrylic wall holding back water.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: All American
programme.desc: Some of the best know Food Network stars talk about their favourite American dishes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Messy
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern, Duff, Alton Brown and others share what they say are delicious, gooey, sloppy and best of all... MESSY.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Ooey, Gooey and Cheesy
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets messy in New Orleans with a bacon-onion jam, brie and brioche burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brisket For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits an old San Antonio institution given new life by their phenomenal bacon and blue cheese burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoking Meats And Summertime Eats
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Charleston, S.C., where he smokes a whole hog on a supersized indoor smoke pit and devours a slow-smoked rib-eye steak sandwich complete with melted cheddar and caramelized onions.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet Treats and Savory Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with triple-processed pork belly that's cured, brined and smoked to meaty perfection. In Seattle, tender braised lamb shoulder amps up a traditional breakfast hash.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southwest Smoke Signals
programme.desc: The smoke signals of fiery feasts lure Roger Mooking to the Southwest, where his first stop is West Alley BBQ and Smokehouse in Chandler, Ariz. The hot spot specializes in Tennessee-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Masters
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets two barbecue brainiacs who have mastered the art of marrying heat and meat to turn out top-notch barbecue. Pitmaster Christopher Prieto teaches students the science of smoking and seasoning meats at Prime Barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Getting Piggy With It
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes hog-wild at two legendary barbecue restaurants located in America's Barbecue Belt. At A&R Bar-B-Que in Memphis, Roger helps owner Andrew Pillard load racks of St. Louis-style ribs into custom wood-fired pits.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire And Family
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the South to visit two family-run barbecue joints that have been passing down recipes and rigs for generations.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern goes on a gastronomic tour of Las Vegas, NV. From quail breast stuffed with foie gras and mouth-watering Waygu steaks to classic veal Parmigiana and tantalizing Thai, Sin City has it all.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Los Angeles, California, is the capital of stardom, and that includes its cuisine. In a city known for such edible icons as Korean tacos and the L.A. street dog, Andrew Zimmern explores just what makes this destination so delicious.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the iconic British dishes and ethnically diverse foods that have put London on the culinary map, from humble shepherd's pie and posh beef Wellington to sizzling seekh kebabs and smoky Jamaican jerk chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hong Kong
programme.desc: The city of Hong Kong's seven million residents flock to its many restaurants, street carts, and noodle houses daily. From dim sum to congee to roast goose, Andrew Zimmern finds out just what makes this destination so delicious!

programme.desc: Goofy struggles to keep Minnie's surprise for Mickey's birthday a secret. The Happy Helpers are asked to help a band get back together.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy Goes Goofy

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Art Show
programme.desc: Mickey's putting on an Arts and Crafts Show and everyone busily works on their art.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Big Balloon Race
programme.desc: Mickey helps Donald fly in the Big Balloon Race so he can win a big blue ribbon. They use stickers to patch up the balloon and an elephant helps weigh the balloon down after it flies into orbit. Later, they rescue Pete, who's stuck in a tree.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Caught Blue-Handed/ To Squeak, or not to Squeak
programme.desc: When a mysterious rash of blue spots breaks out among some of the toys in the clinic, Doc traces the 'mystery pox' back to Donny's toy monster, Glo-Bo, who had been finger-painting earlier in the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Super Wish
programme.desc: Goofy wishes he could be a super-hero so that he can help out his friends.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Giant Adventure
programme.desc: When Willie the Giant gets a stomach ache, Mickey's buddy Goofy embarks on a fairytale quest to retrieve a magical elixir that will make his friend feel better. Along the way, Goofy encounters some enchanting characters.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Magical Mix-up
programme.desc: Goofy the Great accidentally causes Pluto's doghouse to magically disappear.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey and the Enchanted Egg
programme.desc: Mickey finds an egg, which soon hatches a baby dragon.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Sir Goofs-a-lot
programme.desc: Goofy sets out on a quest to retrieve three items in order to be knighted the bravest.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Fun-tastical Field Day/ Clarabelle on the Mooo-ve!
programme.desc: During Fun-tastical Field Day, Donald tries to do all the competitions himself. The girls reunite for a race so that Clarabelle can try to become a Roadsterette!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Perfecto Day!/ Running of the Roadsters!
programme.desc: While in Madrid, Mickey plans a perfect day for Minnie, but a playful baby bull has other plans. Minnie and Daisy make a bet with Mickey and Donald over who will win the race.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: I Heart Rufus/ Trolley Trouble
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly reunite Cupcake and Rufus after a fight; Bob forgets his camera on a trolley.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Kitty/ Polly Wants a Pug
programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.desc: When the special scarf Priya designed for the Queen goes missing, it's up to Mira to help find it! Mira juggles babysitting her cousin and searching for a missing bike.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo's and Rolly's Birthday / Electric Pugaloo

programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Monstrous Truck/ Minnie's Vacation Home!

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star

programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.
